data.title: Add /dso:doctor skill to evaluate DSO plugin installation health
data.description:
Add a /dso:doctor skill that performs a deterministic self-audit of the DSO plugin installation, producing a reproducible health score. Currently DSO validates code but does not validate the health of its own installation.

## Inspiration

everything-claude-code (131k stars) implements /harness-audit — a deterministic quality scoring tool that produces a reproducible baseline reliability score for the plugin installation itself, enabling regression detection when configurations change.

## What /dso:doctor Should Check

1. **Hook integrity** — all required hooks registered and functioning (pre-commit, PostToolUse, PreToolUse dispatchers)
2. **Ticket system health** — tickets branch mounted, worktree accessible, reducer functional, smoke test passes
3. **Config validity** — dso-config.conf parseable, required keys present, referenced paths exist
4. **Script availability** — all scripts in plugins/dso/scripts/ are executable and have required dependencies
5. **Skill registration** — all skills discoverable, SKILL.md files present and parseable
6. **Agent routing** — agent-routing.conf valid, all referenced agents exist in plugins/dso/agents/
7. **Test infrastructure** — .test-index valid, test directories exist, test gate functional
8. **Review gate** — review-gate-allowlist.conf valid, review-gate.sh and pre-commit-review-gate.sh functional
9. **Git hooks** — pre-commit hooks installed and matching expected versions
10. **Dependencies** — required external tools available (python3, ruff, etc.)

## Output

- Deterministic numeric health score (0-100)
- Per-category pass/warn/fail status
- Specific remediation instructions for each failure
- Score should be reproducible — same installation state always produces the same score
- Enable regression detection: run /dso:doctor after config changes to verify nothing broke

Reference: https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code
